title: Chitin Binding Assay Using Chitin Magnetic Beads
author: Robert Hooftman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8anhsde

steps.title: Make the following buffer
steps.instruction: Make the following buffer: 1 X CBD Column Binding Buffer %s %s Tris-HCl 20 mM Adjust pH to 8 using HCl (2,42 g/L) NaCl 500 mM (29,22 g/L) EDTA 1 mM (0,292 g/L) Tween-20 0.05% v/v 500 ul/ 1 L Gently mix the beads solution and resuspend thoroughly. Chitin Magnetic Beads - 5 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #E8036S

steps.title: Aliquot 50 ul of beads solution...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 50 ul of beads solution into a 2 ml microfuge tube

steps.title: Apply a magnet for 30 seconds...
steps.instruction: Apply a magnet for 30 seconds to pull the beads to one side. Remove the excess liquid

steps.title: Wash the beads 3 times with...
steps.instruction: Wash the beads 3 times with 500 ul of 1x CBD Column Binding Buffer. Apply magnet and remove the liquid.

steps.title: Load 200-500 ul of cell supernatant with the beads. Note
steps.instruction: Load 200-500 ul of cell supernatant with the beads. Note: when making dilutions of the supernatant, dilute in CBD Column Binding Buffer.

steps.title: Mix thoroughly and incubate for 1...
steps.instruction: Mix thoroughly and incubate for 1 hour at 4°C at constant agitation.

steps.title: Apply magnet for 30 seconds and...
steps.instruction: Apply magnet for 30 seconds and remove supernatant with a pipette. Save the supernatant.

steps.title: Wash beads 3 times with 500...
steps.instruction: Wash beads 3 times with 500 ul of 1x CBD Column Binding Buffer. Apply magnet for 30 seconds and pipette off liquid. Save the wash fractions.

steps.title: To remove proteins from the beads,...
steps.instruction: To remove proteins from the beads, boil beads for 5 minutes in 50 ul SDS-Page sample buffer at 95 °C

steps.title: Run fractions on a protein gel
steps.instruction: Run fractions on a protein gel
